image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: A runaway greenhouse turned Venus into a crushing, scorching world.
Context visual: Imagine a planet where the temperature reaches 900 degrees Fahrenheit. That's Venus.
Escalation visual: Once similar to Earth, Venus underwent a dramatic change, trapping heat like a furnace.
Evidence visual: Its thick atmosphere, rich in carbon dioxide, creates extreme pressure—over 90 times that of Earth.
Payoff visual: This runaway greenhouse effect not only scorched the surface but also created sulfuric acid clouds.
Cta visual: Curious about more planetary mysteries? Hit that follow button!
